name: APA 7 formatter
description: Format a list of bibliographic sources as APA 7 — both inline citations ('(Smith et al., 2024)') and a sorted reference list (Markdown bullets, italic journal titles, ampersand rules). Accepts the merged shape that openalex_search + crossref_verify produce; missing fields degrade gracefully (no 'undefined' in output). Pure-compute, no network.

sources.description: Array of sources. Each may carry: title, authors (array of {family, given} or display strings), year, container (journal), volume, issue, pages, doi, url. Use the output of openalex_search.sources merged with crossref_verify.results when available.

want.description: What to return. 'inline' yields an array of '(Author, Year)' strings paired with their source. 'reference_list' yields the markdown bibliography. 'both' returns both fields. Default 'both'.
